mapper.select: select * from knowledge_document where document_uid = #{documentUid} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update knowledge_document set parse_status = 'PARSE_CHUNKED', review_status = 'WAIT_AUDIT', chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, error_message = null where id = #{documentId} and current_version_id = #{versionId} and deleted = 0

update knowledge_document set file_resource_id = #{fileResourceId}, current_version_id = #{versionId}, name = #{name}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_ext = #{fileExt}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_hash = #{fileHash}, parse_status = 'UPLOADED', index_status = 'WAIT_INDEX', review_status = 'NOT_SUBMITTED', publish_status = 'UNPUBLISHED', chunk_count = 0, error_message = null where id = #{documentId} and deleted = 0
update knowledge_document set deleted = 1 where id = #{documentId} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(chunk_count), 0) from knowledge_document where deleted = 0

select * from knowledge_document where deleted = 0 and ( parse_status = 'PROCESS_FAILED' or review_status = 'WAIT_AUDIT' or review_status = 'AUDIT_PASSED' or parse_status in ('UPLOADED', 'PARSE_CHUNKING') ) order by case when parse_status = 'PROCESS_FAILED' then 1 when review_status = 'WAIT_AUDIT' then 2 when review_status = 'AUDIT_PASSED' then 3 else 4 end, update_time desc limit #{limitSize}
